content:
🔥 Edit-Banana | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Transforming non-editable visual diagrams from images into editable formats for easy modification and reuse.
✨ Key Features: • Converts static images of diagrams into editable DrawIO (XML) format • High-fidelity reconstruction preserving original details and logical relationships • Powered by SAM 3 and multimodal large models
📖 Summary: Edit Banana is a framework that converts static visual formats, such as figures and diagrams from images, into fully editable formats like DrawIO (XML). It leverages advanced AI models, including SAM 3 and multimodal large models, to reconstruct diagrams with high fidelity, preserving original details and logical relationships.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
